---
title: "Life Beyond the Desk"
---

## 🏆 Achievements

- Completed the **Dublin Marathon 2024**, raising €1,700 for the Child Health Foundation
- **Bronze Gaisce Award** for personal and community activities
- **Pathways to Success Certificate** — DCU extra-curricular achievement
- **Grade 3 Piano** — Royal Irish Academy of Music
- Learning **Italian** as a second international language; fluent Irish speaker

---
